data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Utilizes a microservices architecture which allows for independent deployment and scaling of services.
data.technical_spec: Microservices using AWS Lambda, Kubernetes, Docker.

data.title: Scalable Databases
data.description: Employs scalable databases to handle large volumes of transactions and data efficiently.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Leverages a global CDN for faster content delivery and reduced latency.

data.title: Event-Driven Architecture
data.description: Incorporates event-driven architecture for real-time processing and system responsiveness.

data.title: Load Balancers
data.description: Utilizes load balancers to distribute incoming application traffic across multiple targets.
